title: Evangelionand the Illuminati
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion,and the Illuminati. Post by Hypercube » Tue Jul 06, 2010 4:35 pm Greetings. First if you don't know what are the Illuminati,i suggest you to check this link: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminati It's only a flat definition,but there are a lot more documents and documentaries which tell a lot more about them (Check Youtube if you are interested). Well,i posted this topic because i found an interesting symbol in Evangelion:You Can (Not) Advance,and here is it: You can see beneath Shinji's feet a symbol similar to this one: So? What do you conclude through this "coincidence"? If you discovered other symbols like this one or any other illuminati marks,please share them here in this topic. Thanks

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Jul 06, 2010 4:37 pm Check the backs of the SELLE monoliths.

[]: Post by Clover » Tue Jul 06, 2010 4:40 pm Seele = Illuminati

[]: Post by subAtomic » Tue Jul 06, 2010 5:30 pm The eye and the pyramid are such hokey secret society symbols that have been simultaneously attributed to the Illuminati, the Freemasons, and just about every other Mystery religion or group since the beginning of recorded history. Their esoteric meanings are "omniscience" and "the power of human ingenuity" among 4,265 other meanings, each made up by a different producer working for the History Channel.

[]: Post by ran1 » Tue Jul 06, 2010 5:52 pm The more obvious religious symbols in NGE and Rebuild are pretty much summed up by Anno himself.

[]: Re: Evangelion,and the Illuminati. Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jul 06, 2010 8:27 pm Hypercube wrote: What do you conclude through this "coincidence"?

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Jul 06, 2010 8:43 pm Seems to me that it resemble one of the Freemasons symbols rather than one of the Illuminati's.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 06, 2010 10:45 pm Old thread about those symbols in the back of the Seele monoliths: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5499 That link to the Masonic Dictionary is 404'ing, so you'll have to go to archive.org for it: http://web.archive.org/web/20080405231723/http://www.masonicdictionary.com/47.html The same symbols can be seen in 2.0 as well, when Seele are talking to Gendo about the loss of Eva-04.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:47 am As part of their self-admitted display of pedantry, it would have been surprising not to see some related symbols being scattered around the Cabbalistic core. The big difference between this and SELain is that the latter was both less subtle and less discriminating in all the conspiracy bait that got scattered around.

[]: Post by Hypercube » Wed Jul 07, 2010 8:56 am Anyway,that symbol is for the illuminati and not for the freemason (even though Freemasons are part of the illuminati...) and the owl present on the monolith is for the bohemian club. And this kind of symbol is present everywhere....and i mean...EVERYWHERE (even in Tom and Jerry....) and in most of the mvies/cartoon in which there was this symbol,there subliminal message sent to the viewers... So... Maybe there is a hidden message behind Evangelion story? Maybe Evangelion producer or realizator is a freemason or part of the Bohemian club? A more deep research is needed...

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 07, 2010 9:04 am The use of such symbols does not imply anything about Anno, other than the fact that he thought the symbols were cool. Anno uses a lot of symbols from just about everywhere, and a strong majority of them probably don't even mean a thing within the context of the show other than 'looking cool'. If these symbols were to mean anything relevant to the show then I would say that it simply adds to the mysterious nature/motives of Gendo, and the people he's associated with, Seele. It doesn't imply exactly what his motives are; it just holds a sign that says, "hey look! Mysterious guy here!"

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 07, 2010 11:25 am Hypercube wrote: and the owl present on the monolith is for the bohemian club.

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jul 07, 2010 12:35 pm subAtomic wrote: The eye and the pyramid are such hokey secret society symbols that have been simultaneously attributed to the Illuminati, the Freemasons, and just about every other Mystery religion or group since the beginning of recorded history.

[]: Post by Hypercube » Wed Jul 07, 2010 12:43 pm And that's when the Bavarian Illuminati was created... By the way,the Seele reflects the illuminati very well,a secret organisation which formed by the most powerful men which control the world from the shadows,and still....both of them follow prophecies which are somehow close to each other....and both use almost the same symbol.... I wonder why Evangelion:2.0 had so much success...

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:30 pm Hypercube wrote: By the way,the Seele reflects the illuminati very well,a secret organisation which formed by the most powerful men which control the world from the shadows,and still....both of them follow prophecies which are somehow close to each other....and both use almost the same symbol....

[]: Post by Hypercube » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:50 pm I implyed the term coincidence sarcasticly,hence the "____". Ok i will tell another thing...The nerv building...it's a pyramide. And guess what means a pyramide for the illuminati conspiracy theorists? http://www.holygrail-church.fsnet.co.uk/The%20Illuminati.htm check this and you will understand. Furthermore,if what you say is true,then any fully dictatorial country in anime or any other fiction should use the Nazi symbol? no. Any Pirate organization should use the skull and bones symbol? no. So i think that what you said is maybe right,but it's still full of flaws.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:54 pm Hypercube wrote: I wonder why Evangelion:2.0 had so much success...

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:57 pm Hypercube wrote: Furthermore,if what you say is true,then any fully dictatorial country in anime or any other fiction should use the Nazi symbol? no. Any Pirate organization should use the skull and bones symbol? no. So i think that what you said is maybe right,but it's still full of flaws.

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 07, 2010 1:57 pm Hypercube wrote: Furthermore,if what you say is true,then any fully dictatorial country in anime or any other fiction should use the Nazi symbol? no. Any Pirate organization should use the skull and bones symbol? no. So i think that what you said is maybe right,but it's still full of flaws.

[]: Post by Hypercube » Wed Jul 07, 2010 2:26 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: You're trying to hard to tie The Illuminati with Anno/Eva.
